svg.title: Normalized vs denormalized table layout
svg.desc: Left side shows normalized: an orders table and a separate customers table linked by customer_id. Right side shows denormalized: one wide table with all columns merged together.

g.onclick: sendPrompt('What is the orders table in a normalized schema?')
sendPrompt('What is the customers table in a normalized schema?')
sendPrompt('What does a denormalized orders table look like?')
